name: Indian Lamb & Spinach,v1.1
recipeIngredient: 340 grams frozen spinach, cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Thaw frozen ground lamb in a microwave oven.
2. Thaw frozen spinach. If not precut, cut it into 1/4-inch strips.
3. In a large non-stick skillet, heat oil and sauté onion until softened.
Add lamb, turmeric, coriander, ginger, and ground cumin.
Simmer, stirring occasionally for 10 minutes until meat is browned.
4. Stir in spinach, yogurt, thyme, dry mustard, and sugar.
Cover and simmer for 15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. If needed, add water only.
Simmer for an additional 15 minutes until meat is tender.
